vexing_puzzlebox.description: at the start of each combat, add a random card into your hand. it costs 0 energy.

vitruvian_minion.name: Vitruvian Minion
vitruvian_minion.description: cards containing "minion" deal double damage and gain double block.

war_hammer.name: War Hammer
war_hammer.description: whenever you kill an elite, upgrade 4 random cards.

whispering_earring.name: Whispering Earring
whispering_earring.description: gain colorless energy at the start of each turn. vakuu plays your first turn for you.

white_beast_statue.name: White Beast Statue
white_beast_statue.description: potions always appear in combat rewards.

white_star.name: White Star
white_star.description: elites drop an additional rare card reward.

wing_charm.name: Wing Charm
wing_charm.description: a random card in each card reward is enchanted with swift 1.

ashwater.name: Ashwater
ashwater.description: exhaust any number of cards in your hand.

attack_potion.name: Attack Potion
attack_potion.description: choose 1 of 3 random attack cards to add into your hand. it's free to play this turn.

beetle_juice.name: Beetle Juice
beetle_juice.description: enemy's attacks deal 30% less damage for the next 4 turns.

blessing_of_the_forge.name: Blessing of the Forge
blessing_of_the_forge.description: upgrade all cards in your hand for the rest of combat.

blood_potion.name: Blood Potion
blood_potion.description: heal for 20% of your max hp.

bottled_potential.name: Bottled Potential
bottled_potential.description: shuffle all your cards into your draw pile. draw 5 cards.

clarity_extract.name: Clarity Extract
clarity_extract.description: draw 1 card. at the start of your next 3 turns, draw 1 additional card.

colorless_potion.name: Colorless Potion
colorless_potion.description: choose 1 of 3 random colorless cards to add into your hand. it's free to play this turn.

cosmic_concoction.name: Cosmic Concoction
cosmic_concoction.description: add 3 upgraded colorless cards into your hand.

cunning_potion.name: Cunning Potion
cunning_potion.description: add 3 upgraded shivs into your hand.

distilled_chaos.name: Distilled Chaos
distilled_chaos.description: play the top 3 cards of your draw pile.

droplet_of_precognition.name: Droplet of Precognition
droplet_of_precognition.description: choose a card in your draw pile and add it into your hand.

duplicator.name: Duplicator
duplicator.description: this turn, your next card is played an extra time.

entropic_brew.name: Entropic Brew
entropic_brew.description: fill all your empty potion slots with random potions.

essence_of_darkness.name: Essence of Darkness
essence_of_darkness.description: channel a dark for each of your orb slots.
